chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.761 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case --------------------------------------------- 29.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Hamza, advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Mohsin Mangi, A.P.G. Mr. Uzair Rasool, advocate for respondent No.4 ------------------------------------------- Mr. Muhammad Hamza, advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Khawaja Muhammad Azeem, learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press instant criminal miscellaneous application, which is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gusher/PS
